name: Originless
description: Private, decentralized file sharing for Nostr and the web
compose:
name: slashnode-originless
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/besoeasy/originless:0.1.0
    container_name: originless
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
      STORAGE_MAX: ${STORAGE_MAX:-20GB}
    volumes:
      - app_data:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3232:3232
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data:
    name: slashnode-originless_app_data
